title: Rebind v0.5.39 candidate metadata after release-process correction
outOfScope: Quick Install implementation or a separate budget-only Work Item

riskAssessment.reason: Candidate metadata must match the corrected source tree before publication.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized normal release and requires the complete Work Item lifecycle.

preReviewWarnings: Do not publish or tag from this Work Item.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record lifecycle checkpoints before metadata generation and archive.

acceptance: Regenerate v0.5.39 release-freeze, digest, state, and release metadata through the corrected premerge finalizer.
Release preflight, supply-chain, and state consistency pass on the candidate tree.
Complete Finish/archive/PR/merge/ai-close lifecycle; publication remains out of scope.
guidelines: Keep release evidence source-bound and fail closed.
Keep candidate and published evidence distinct.
Do not rewrite immutable archived Work Item evidence.

intent.problem: The v0.5.39 candidate metadata was generated before the root premerge tree-binding correction and is stale for the corrected release process.
constraints: Use the corrected finalizer after this Work Item is archived.
Do not publish or tag in this Work Item.
intent.rationale: Rebind the candidate metadata once, through the corrected lifecycle, so the later publication workflow sees one internally consistent source-bound candidate.

rawUserRequest: Continue toward a normal new-version release, completing every Work Item through Contract, Preflight, PR, merge, ai-close-work-item, and default-branch synchronization.

declaredIntent.summary: Rebind v0.5.39 candidate evidence to the corrected release-process source tree.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: All four candidate metadata files are regenerated by the corrected finalizer after Work Item archive.
Source identity, supply-chain evidence, and release-state consistency pass before publication.
This Work Item does not create a tag or public release.

repaymentRecords: release_v0539_metadata_rebind|archiveGrowth|524|525|user|2026-07-24|Reserve the single metadata rebind archive required after the root release-process correction; repay during final plan cleanup.
budgetImpact.reason: Functional release metadata rebind; no separate budget-only Work Item.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized normal release continuation through complete lifecycle closure.

rollbackNote: Revert the candidate metadata commit and restore the prior candidate files; do not rewrite archived Work Item evidence.
